full_text:
Fan Min (Shengda) 樊敏 (升達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fan Min (樊敏), styledShengda (升達). An expert at Chunqiu, he would become an elder statesmen under Liu Zhang. Fan Min was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Liu Yan, and Liu Zhang. Fan Min lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
